political.s: FEC: $124K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 6 executive donors.

charity.s: $18M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.09% of revenue) via Colgate-Palmolive Foundation.

environment.s: Forest 500 2024: score 55/100 — partial deforestation policy / implementation gaps on supply-chain. Exposed to palm, pulp.

dei.s: EEO-1 workforce demographics on federal record (FY2020, DOL OFCCP FOIA release): 4,615 US employees — 39.4% women, 31.9% racial/ethnic minorities; management 46.3% women, 38.7% minorities.

wiki.hq: New York City, New York City
wiki.extract: The Colgate-Palmolive Company, commonly known as Colgate-Palmolive, is an American multinational consumer products company headquartered on Park Avenue in Midtown Manhattan, New York City. The company specializes in the production, distribution, and provision of household, health care, personal care, and veterinary products.

cases.caseName: WenzhouDuoliang International Trade Co., Ltd. v. Colgate-Palmolive Company
Kaljaj v. Southern Graphic Systems, LLC

cases.natureOfSuit: Civil Rights: Americans with Disabilities - Other

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

health.s: 2 CPSC recalls on record; sample hazard: the recalled products can contain pseudomonas species bacteria.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during maintenance, cleaning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was clearing a bottle jam from a trimmer reamer when the machine cycled and the employee's hand was caught in the machinery, fracturing four fingers and severely lacerating his hand and fingers.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during maintenance, cleaning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On June 25, 2018, an employee was fixing a leak in a liquid dish bottle labeler when the machine started up, fracturing both of the employee's hands.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee slipped, fell, and broke his wrist in an attempt to adjust boxes on a pallet that was on the palletizer.

mostRecent.reason: Labeling: Label Mix-Up: Some hello wild strawberry fluoride toothpaste, packaged in cartons labeled as hello wild strawberry fluoride toothpaste were incorrectly filled in tubes labeled as hello fresh watermelon fluoride free toothpaste.

sampleRecalls.title: Colgate-Palmolive Recalls Fabuloso Multi-Purpose Cleaners Due to Risk of Exposure to Bacteria
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves certain Fabuloso Multi-Purpose Cleaners, which is a multi-purpose cleaner that can be used to clean most residential hard surfaces. The first 8 digits of the lot code of the recalled products are 2348US78 through 2365US78 and 3001US78 through 3023US78. A list of the UPC and lot codes of the recall…
hazards: The recalled products can contain Pseudomonas species bacteria, including Pseudomonas aeruginosa and Pseudomonas fluorescens, which are environmental organisms…
units: About 4.9 million (In addition, about 56,000 in Canada)
